opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach blew up like a balloon right after dinner and the cramps are unbearable. I've had explosive diarrhoea over and over tonight and I feel like I'm going to pass out on the toilet. I get bad reactions to foods but this is way worse than usual and I'm on my own — I'm really scared.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on within about half an hour of eating something I've eaten before and thought was safe, and it's much worse than my usual flare-ups — the dizziness when I stand up is frightening me.

symptom_narrative.onset: about half an hour after dinner tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours, coming in waves
symptom_narrative.character: gripping, cramping stomach pains with loads of bloating and my belly puffing right out
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the cramps are unbearable, maybe a 9 out of 10 when they peak
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my belly, not one spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes in waves, eases a bit after I go to the toilet then builds again
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: the pain settles a little right after a bowel motion
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps coming back in waves on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've gone really flushed and hot, I feel wiped out and exhausted, and I keep feeling like I might faint when I stand up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get flare-ups like this fairly often but usually milder — tonight is the worst one
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've been stuck in the bathroom and can barely stand up

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing reactions to lots of foods and a gut that plays up a lot — a doctor mentioned my mast cells might be behind it
past_medical_history.how_managed: mostly by avoiding trigger foods; not on any regular preventer medication right now

allergies_as_reported.substance: multiple foods trigger reactions (still working out which)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, no one else at home tonight to help

objective_data_offered.value: my belly is really swollen and bloated, sticking right out
my face and chest have gone red and hot
objective_data_offered.timing: during the worst of it tonight

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's racing and pounding
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's subjective sense of a fast heartbeat, not a measured rate
